headline: KeyCorp (KEY) Stock Could Be 9.7% Undervalued After New 2031 Notes Offering
summary: KeyCorp’s New Notes Due 2031 and What They Signal KeyCorp (KEY) has launched a fixed income offering of senior and subordinated medium term notes due 2031, giving investors another way to assess the bank’s capital structure and funding approach alongside its common stock. The new notes sit within KeyCorp’s broader mix of debt and equity financing. For equity investors, the terms and structure of these notes can offer clues about how the bank balances growth, risk and funding costs across...
